feeds.title: 药物 · 临床试验
feeds.term: (lecanemab OR donanemab OR "anti-amyloid" OR "tau-targeting" OR trontinemab) AND ("clinical trial"[Publication Type] OR phase OR efficacy)

feeds.title: 机制 · 基础研究
feeds.term: ("Alzheimer Disease"[Mesh]) AND (amyloid OR tau OR neuroinflammation OR APOE OR microglia) AND (mechanism OR pathology OR pathogenesis)

feeds.title: 诊断 · 生物标志物
feeds.term: (Alzheimer) AND ("p-tau217" OR "plasma biomarker" OR "blood biomarker" OR "amyloid PET" OR "GFAP") AND (diagnosis OR detection OR screening)

feeds.title: 预防 · 生活方式
feeds.term: (Alzheimer OR dementia) AND (prevention OR diet OR exercise OR "cognitive reserve" OR lifestyle OR "physical activity") AND (cohort OR "risk factor" OR longitudinal)

feeds.title: 新手村 · 入门综述
feeds.term: ("Alzheimer Disease"[Mesh]) AND ("Review"[Publication Type]) AND (overview OR introduction OR "current understanding" OR primer OR basics)

drug.title: UPLC-ESI-qTOF-MS metabolomic characterization and in vivo neuroprotective activity of Diplotaxis harra ethanolic extract through antioxidant, anti-cholinesterase, and anti-amyloid mechanisms.
drug.zh: Diplotaxis harra提取物通过抗氧化、抗胆碱酯酶和抗淀粉样蛋白机制，在阿尔茨海默病大鼠模型中改善认知并逆转多靶点病理。

drug.title: Efficacy, safety and policy implications of anti-amyloid monoclonal antibodies for Alzheimer's disease: protocol for a living systematic review and meta-analysis.
drug.zh: 抗淀粉样蛋白单抗治疗阿尔茨海默病的疗效与安全性需通过持续更新的系统评价和荟萃分析来评估。

drug.title: Optimal control for anti-abeta treatment in Alzheimer's disease using a reaction-diffusion model.
drug.journal: Journal of the Royal Society, Interface
drug.zh: 基于反应扩散模型的最优控制策略可实现抗Aβ治疗的个体化精准给药。

drug.title: Microglial checkpoint collapse in Alzheimer's disease: a tri-axial framework for biomarker-informed neuroimmune therapy.
drug.zh: 小胶质细胞检查点崩溃是阿尔茨海默病核心机制，提出三轴框架指导生物标志物驱动的神经免疫治疗。

drug.title: Longitudinal biomarkers in dementia with Lewy bodies: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
drug.zh: 系统综述和荟萃分析发现，路易体痴呆的纵向生物标志物中，结构性MRI全脑萎缩率与临床进展显著相关。

drug.title: Anti-amyloid therapy eligibility in a longitudinal brain-donor cohort with post mortem confirmation.
drug.zh: 纵向尸检队列显示，仅约25%早期病理确诊AD患者符合抗淀粉样蛋白治疗资格，血管病变等排除标准大幅限制真实世界适用性。

drug.title: Quantifying Short-Term Functional Changes After Lecanemab Treatment in Early Alzheimer's Disease: An Exploratory 3-Month Follow-Up Case Report Using Eye Movement and Gait Analysis.
drug.zh: 伦卡奈单抗治疗3个月即可通过眼动与步态分析量化早期阿尔茨海默病患者的短期功能改善。

drug.title: The potential of key Alzheimer's plasma biomarkers to mimic tau PET MUBADA-based disease staging.
drug.zh: 血浆P-tau217等关键生物标志物可替代tau-PET对阿尔茨海默病进行精准分期。

mech.title: C1q and immunoglobulins mediate activity-dependent synapse loss in the adult brain.
mech.zh: 成年脑中C1q与免疫球蛋白介导活动依赖性突触丢失，且阿尔茨海默病中抑制过度活动可减轻该损伤。

mech.title: Regulatory Effects of the PDE8B Inhibitor PF-04957325 on Cognitive Impairment and Neuroinflammation in Aβ-Induced Alzheimer's Disease Mouse Models.
mech.zh: PDE8B抑制剂PF-04957325通过激活cAMP/PKA/CREB通路并抑制TLR4/MyD88/NF-κB通路，改善Aβ诱导的阿尔茨海默病小鼠认知障碍和

mech.title: Inhibition of miR-25-3p Alleviates Neuroinflammation in Alzheimer's Disease By Targeting ADAM10.
mech.zh: 抑制miR-25-3p通过靶向ADAM10减轻阿尔茨海默病神经炎症，为诊断和治疗提供新靶点。

mech.title: Cistanoside A decreases Tau hyperphosphorylation and neuronal apoptosis through the AKT/GSK3β pathway in okadaic acid-induced in vivo and in vitro models of Alzheimer's disease.
mech.zh: Cis A通过AKT/GSK3β通路减轻Tau过度磷酸化和神经元凋亡，在AD模型中显示治疗潜力。

mech.title: Clinical, Radiological, and Immunohistological Distinctions Between Limbic-Predominant and Typical Alzheimer's Disease: A Systematic Review.
mech.zh: 边缘优势型阿尔茨海默病在临床、影像及免疫组化上与典型AD存在显著差异，需区分诊断。

mech.title: Lecanemab treatment improves B cell subpopulation immune homeostasis in patients with Alzheimer's disease.
mech.zh: Lecanemab通过恢复B细胞亚群比例与功能，重建阿尔茨海默病患者外周免疫稳态。

mech.title: High-resolution structure of monomorphic Aβ1-40 fibrils.
mech.journal: Proceedings of the National Academy of S
mech.zh: 生理条件下Aβ1-40纤维呈单一构象，高分辨率结构为AD病理研究提供可靠基线。

mech.title: Modular brain networks shape amyloid-driven tau spread and cognitive decline.
mech.zh: 脑网络模块结构决定tau蛋白从颞叶枢纽扩散的效率及认知下降速度。

dx.title: Prognostic value of plasma brain-derived pTau.
dx.journal: medRxiv : the preprint server for health
dx.zh: 血浆脑源性pTau217在预测认知未受损人群临床及淀粉样蛋白进展方面未显著优于总pTau217。

dx.title: Dissociable structural and molecular pathways of age-related change in sustained attention.
dx.journal: bioRxiv : the preprint server for biolog
dx.zh: 衰老导致持续注意力下降，其背后存在可分离的白质微结构退变与阿尔茨海默病病理两条独立通路。

dx.title: Relationships between longitudinal retinal amyloid imaging and amyloid PET in the A4 Trial.
dx.zh: A4试验中，视网膜淀粉样蛋白纵向成像与PET结果无显著关联，不支持其作为替代指标。

dx.title: Identifying populations with faster cognitive decline using blood-based biomarkers.
dx.zh: 血液生物标志物阈值可精准识别认知衰退更快的人群，助力预防试验富集。

dx.title: Multicenter validation of plasma p-tau217/ amyloid beta 1-42 ratio in symptomatic Alzheimer's disease.
dx.zh: 血浆p-tau217/β-淀粉样蛋白1-42比值在症状性阿尔茨海默病中可准确预测脑内淀粉样蛋白阳性状态。

dx.title: A Narrative Review of Amyloid-β Monoclonal Antibodies for Alzheimer Disease: How Amyloid Species Engagement May Affect Clinical Outcomes.
dx.zh: 靶向不同Aβ亚型的单抗疗效差异揭示，将斑块降至25 Centiloid以下或为临床获益关键阈值。

dx.title: Can the integration of blood-based biomarkers into Alzheimer's disease diagnosis revolutionize the field?
dx.zh: 血浆p-tau217作为阿尔茨海默病血液生物标志物，在诊断准确性上接近脑脊液和PET，但临床推广仍需标准化。

dx.title: Deep Plasma Proteomics-Based Diagnostic Panel for Early Detection of Amnestic Mild Cognitive Impairment.
dx.zh: 基于深度血浆蛋白质组学构建的诊断模型可有效早期识别遗忘型轻度认知障碍。

prev.title: Adverse childhood experiences, early menopause, cognition, and dementia in older adults in the United States.
prev.zh: 童年不良经历通过提前绝经增加女性痴呆风险，男性无此关联。

prev.title: From Air to Brain: Environmental Nanoparticles as Modifiable Risk Factors for Neurodevelopmental, Neurodegenerative, and Mental Disorders.
prev.zh: 环境纳米颗粒可穿透血脑屏障，是神经发育、退行性及精神障碍的可调控风险因素。

prev.title: Prognostic value of plasma brain-derived pTau.
prev.journal: medRxiv : the preprint server for health
prev.zh: 血浆脑源性pTau217在预测认知未受损人群临床及淀粉样蛋白进展方面未显著优于总pTau217。

prev.title: Associations between cataract and cognitive impairment in a sample of the United States Population.
prev.zh: 美国人群横断面研究表明白内障与认知障碍显著独立相关。

prev.title: Association of long-term physical activity levels with dementia risk and cognitive function in US adults: a prospective cohort study.
prev.zh: 长期高水平体力活动显著降低痴呆风险并改善认知功能。

prev.title: Mapping dementia risk factors and their interactions in Denmark: a nationwide cohort study.
prev.zh: 丹麦全国性队列研究揭示16种可改变风险因素对痴呆症的联合效应与交互作用。

prev.title: The heat exposure, aging trajectories, and Alzheimer's disease (HEAT-AD) study protocol.
prev.zh: 城市热岛暴露加速老年人认知衰退，增加阿尔茨海默病生物标志物风险。

prev.title: Hierarchical-circular model of biological memory: a multilevel hypothesis for pathogenesis and allostatic integrity in Alzheimer's disease and related dementias.
prev.zh: 提出生物记忆层级循环模型，认为痴呆是系统稳态失调而非单一脑病理。

intro.title: Osteoimmuno-brain axis: a bridge connecting osteoporosis and cognitive decline and its clinical significance in dementia and Alzheimer's disease.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是骨头和大脑通过免疫系统互相影响，帮你理解为啥骨质疏松和记性变差常一起出现，对预防和早发现老年痴呆有参考。

intro.title: Advances in the Core Role and Mechanisms of Mitochondrial Dysfunction in Alzheimer's Disease.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑细胞里的能量工厂坏了会怎样引发老年痴呆，看懂它就能明白为啥要保护大脑能量。

intro.title: Chemokines in Alzheimer's Disease: Early Defence, Late Damage and the Impact of Sex and Infection.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑里一种叫“化学信使”的小分子，在阿尔茨海默病早期保护大脑、晚期却加重损伤，还受性别和感染影响，帮你理解为啥病情因人而异。

intro.title: [Research progress on role of PINK1/Parkin-mediated mitophagy in Alzheimer's disease and TCM interventions].
intro.journal: Zhongguo Zhong yao za zhi = Zhongguo zho
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑细胞里的“垃圾处理系统”坏了会加速老年痴呆，并介绍了中药如何帮忙修复这个系统。

intro.title: Calibrating microglia states in Alzheimer's disease: decoding immune-metabolic networks and nano-targeted multicomponent therapies.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑里一种叫“小胶质细胞”的清洁工在阿尔茨海默病中如何罢工和修复，帮普通人看懂未来可能更安全的联合治疗方向。

intro.title: Brain Endothelial Glycocalyx as a Blood-Facing Translational Interface in Alzheimer's Disease: Beyond "Leaky" Barriers Toward Repair-First Stratification.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑血管表面一层糖膜在老年痴呆中如何受损，帮普通人理解未来可能从修复这层膜入手，而不是只盯着血管渗漏。

intro.title: HDAC3 in Alzheimer's Disease: established evidence, unresolved questions, and translational priorities.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑里一种叫HDAC3的蛋白质和阿尔茨海默病的关系，帮普通人看懂它到底是不是治病的靶点，以及现有研究还有哪些没搞明白。

intro.title: Advances in 3D cell culture models for alzheimer's disease drug discovery.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是用更逼真的立体脑细胞模型来测试老年痴呆药物，让普通人知道新药研发可能更靠谱、更快出结果。
